basic_details.job_title: SVC Delhi University Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online for Scientific Administrative Assistant/ Field Worker posts
basic_details.short_information: Sri Venkateswara College, University of Delhi (SVC Delhi University) Scientific Administrative Assistant/Field Worker Recruitment 2026 notification has been released on 09 July 2026 on the official website svc.ac.in. A total of 1 vacancy has been announced for the Scientific Administrative Assistant/Field Worker post through the SVC Delhi University Scientific Administrative Assistant/Field Worker Recruitment 2026.

qualification.education_qualification: Under Graduate in any Branch of Science from recognized institution.
qualification.details: Under Graduate in any Branch of Science from a recognized institution.

how_to_apply: Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Prepare your application with complete bio-data including personal details, educational qualifications, and experience.
Attach self-attested copies of all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs.
Clearly mention the post applied for in the subject line of the email.
Send the complete application to the official email address mentioned in the notification.
Ensure the email is sent before the last date: 19-07-2026.
Keep a copy of the sent email for future reference.

content_sections.heading: SVC Delhi University Scientific Administrative Assistant/Field Worker Vacancy 2026 Notification PDF
content_sections.text: Candidates should download and read the SVC Delhi University Jobs 2026 notification PDF carefully to check vacancy details, eligibility, age limit, and application instructions. The notification also includes important dates and selection process details. The direct download link is available in the Important Links section below. Download SVC Delhi University Scientific Administrative Assistant/Field Worker Job 2026 Notification PDF

content_sections.heading: SVC Delhi University Scientific Administrative Assistant/Field Worker Vacancy Details 2026
Eligibility Criteria
content_sections.text: Under Graduate in any Branch of Science from a recognized institution.

content_sections.heading: SVC Delhi University Scientific Administrative Assistant/Field Worker Recruitment 2026 - Important Dates
How to Apply
content_sections.text: Read the official notification carefully before applying. Prepare your application with complete bio-data including personal details, educational qualifications, and experience. Attach self-attested copies of all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs. Clearly mention the post applied for in the subject line of the email. Send the complete application to the official email address mentioned in the notification. Ensure the email is sent before the last date: 19-07-2026. Keep a copy of the sent email for future reference.

content_sections.heading: SVC Delhi University Scientific Administrative Assistant/Field Worker Recruitment 2026 - Important Links

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the Scientific Administrative Assistant/Field Worker post?
faq.answer: The last date to submit your application via email is 19th July 2026. Ensure your application reaches the concerned authority before this deadline.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for this position?
faq.answer: Candidates must possess an Under Graduate degree in any branch of Science from a recognized institution to be eligible for this role.

faq.question: Q3. What is the salary offered for the Scientific Administrative Assistant/Field Worker post?
faq.answer: The selected candidate will receive a consolidated salary of Rs. 20,000/- per month for this contractual position.

faq.question: Q4. How can I apply for the Scientific Administrative Assistant/Field Worker recruitment?
faq.answer: Applications are to be submitted via email. You need to prepare your bio-data, attach necessary documents, and send it to the official email address before the last date.

faq.question: Q5. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q6. What is the total number of vacancies available?
faq.answer: There is a total of 1 vacancy for the post of Scientific Administrative Assistant/Field Worker announced by Sri Venkateswara College.

faq.question: Q7. What is the job type for this position?
faq.answer: The position of Scientific Administrative Assistant/Field Worker is a contractual role.

faq.question: Q8. What is the selection process for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The selection process for this recruitment will be based on an Interview.

faq.question: Q9. Where is Sri Venkateswara College located?
faq.answer: Sri Venkateswara College, part of Delhi University, is located in New Delhi, with the pincode 110021.

faq.question: Q10. Can I find the official notification PDF link here?
faq.answer: Yes, the direct download link for the official notification PDF is provided in the 'Important Links' section of this article for your convenience.
